channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Supreme Court wrestles with gun rights, marijuana, and the right to own a gun
item.description: The argument took place in light of the court's 2022 Bruen decision, which held that for a gun law to be constitutional, it must be analogous to a similar law at the nation's founding in the late 1700s.
item.content:encoded:
The argument took place in light of the court's 2022 Bruen decision, which held that for a gun law to be constitutional, it must be analogous to a similar law at the nation's founding in the late 1700s.

(Image credit: Alex Wroblewski)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Remembering Colman McCarthy, who wrote about peace at 'The Washington Post' for years
item.description: Colman McCarthy dedicated his life to peace — from training to be a monk, to teaching and writing about peace. NPR's Scott Detrow talks with his eldest son, Jim McCarthy, about his father's legacy.
item.content:encoded: Colman McCarthy dedicated his life to peace — from training to be a monk, to teaching and writing about peace. NPR's Scott Detrow talks with his eldest son, Jim McCarthy, about his father's legacy.
item.dc:creator: Marc Rivers

item.title: A homeless shelter and rehab center holds a marathon to get people back on their feet
item.description: Outside of Chicago, a homeless shelter and rehab center called Wayside Cross hosts a unique program to help people get back on their feet, one mile at a time.
item.content:encoded: Outside of Chicago, a homeless shelter and rehab center called Wayside Cross hosts a unique program to help people get back on their feet, one mile at a time.
item.dc:creator: Bob Smietana

item.title: Videos of Bill and Hillary Clinton's depositions in Epstein probe are released
item.description: Republicans on the House Oversight Committee have released videos of Bill and Hillary Clinton's depositions in the committee's ongoing investigation into the Epstein files.
item.content:encoded: Republicans on the House Oversight Committee have released videos of Bill and Hillary Clinton's depositions in the committee's ongoing investigation into the Epstein files.
item.dc:creator: Claudia Grisales

item.title: What Americans make of the U.S. attack on Iran so far
item.description: As missiles continue to fly across the Middle East, what do Americans make of the U.S. attack on Iran so far? Residents of Harrisburg, Pa., weigh in.
item.content:encoded: As missiles continue to fly across the Middle East, what do Americans make of the U.S. attack on Iran so far? Residents of Harrisburg, Pa., weigh in.
item.dc:creator: Frank Langfitt

item.title: IDF spokesperson gives an Israeli perspective on the campaign in Iran
item.description: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Lt. Col. Nadav Shoshani, international spokesperson for the Israeli Defense Forces, about the ongoing war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Lt. Col. Nadav Shoshani, international spokesperson for the Israeli Defense Forces, about the ongoing war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Erika Ryan

item.title: U.S. states take steps to guard against any potential threat from Iran
item.description: Iran has made prior attempts to launch terrorist attacks on U.S. soil, but all have been thwarted in recent years. States are bracing for a heightened threat after the war.
item.content:encoded: Iran has made prior attempts to launch terrorist attacks on U.S. soil, but all have been thwarted in recent years. States are bracing for a heightened threat after the war.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas

item.title: A new single-pill treatment for HIV shows promising results
item.description: A new single-pill treatment for HIV has shown promising results. This is particularly useful for people who have had HIV for decades.
item.content:encoded: A new single-pill treatment for HIV has shown promising results. This is particularly useful for people who have had HIV for decades.
item.dc:creator: Gabrielle Emanuel

item.title: The Trump administration's objectives for the mission in Iran
item.description: President Trump said the ongoing strikes on Iran are the best chance to strike at its nuclear weapons program. But that's the same program he said, not long ago, was completely obliterated.
item.content:encoded: President Trump said the ongoing strikes on Iran are the best chance to strike at its nuclear weapons program. But that's the same program he said, not long ago, was completely obliterated.
item.dc:creator: Tom Bowman

item.title: This woman is providing second-hand clothes that teens don't just need, but want
item.description: Donated clothes for low-income kids aren't always that cool. So a volunteer at a school district in Sonoma County curates, launders and presents clothing donations that teens actually want to wear.
item.content:encoded: Donated clothes for low-income kids aren't always that cool. So a volunteer at a school district in Sonoma County curates, launders and presents clothing donations that teens actually want to wear.
item.dc:creator: Shandra Back
